---
title: "Illustration Portfolio"
---

Whenever I find myself outside of the lab or library, I love to In my free time, I manage a small business where I hand-draw illustrations for independent clients, organizations, and merchandise.

[image]
[text]

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## **On-Campus Business**
#### Austin, TX
#### Fall 2024 - Present
[image]
[text]

## **Women in Data & Statistics Merch Designer**
#### Austin, TX
#### Spring 2026 - Present
For my role as Creative Officer, I have designed materials using software such as Procreate, Photoshop, and Canva.
[image]

## **Commissions for Clients**
#### Remote
#### Fall 2024 - Present
[image]
[text]


------------------------------------------------------------------------
